site_description: Mobile-first directory for gay nightlife, fetish, cruise, darkroom, party, sauna, cinema, shop, and travel venues.
age_gate_text: You must be 18 or older to enter. This site contains adult themes, nightlife information, fetish venues, and sex-positive venue listings.
disclaimer_text: All information provided on this platform is sourced directly from public domains, including but not limited to: official venue websites, Instagram, Facebook, Google Business profiles, and public directory listings. This page is not responsible for the accuracy of this data or for any information that may be considered defamatory. Users rely on this information at their own risk.
about_page_text: Backroom is a practical gay nightlife, fetish, darkroom, and travel venue directory for locals and travellers. It helps users find venues, parties, shops, saunas, cinemas, cruise spaces, and events quickly.
privacy_summary_text: Backroom does not use user accounts at launch. Favourites, shortlists, travel pins, profile choices, and settings are stored locally in your browser. If your browser cache is cleared, this local data may be erased. Export your profile data if you want a backup.
legal_notice_text: Backroom is a public-source directory. Venue details may change at any time. Users should verify opening times, entry rules, dress codes, and event details directly with the venue before relying on them.
form_success_message: Complete the FormSubmit verification window to send your message.
featured_page_intro: Below are some of our favourite venues that we know you will love, visit if you are nearby or plan a trip soon!
external_page_backlink_text: If you are viewing this page outside of the Backroom site click here to open the Backroom site.

labels.no_avatar_results: No results! Message admin to request your favourite.

empty_states.no_featured: No featured venues have been added yet.

error_messages.json_load_failed: Backroom could not load the required site data.
error_messages.form_submit_failed: The report could not be submitted. Please try again.
error_messages.location_unavailable: Location is unavailable. You can enter a location manually.

form_pending_message: Complete the FormSubmit verification window below. If it does not load, use the new-tab button.
